name: Show Admin Credentials
description: Print the Zitadel admin loginname + password prominently in the deploy output. This is the only place a human sees the literal '!Aa1' suffix explained — it's appended to the stack-provided password by the docker-compose template to satisfy Zitadel's password complexity policy.

parameters.name: Zitadel External Domain
parameters.description: Public FQDN Zitadel is exposed under

parameters.name: Zitadel Admin Password
parameters.description: Raw password value from the oidc stack (suffix is added at print time)
